name: Katherine Adams
background: Katherine Adams is Apple’s senior vice president and General Counsel, reporting to CEO Tim Cook. Kate serves on the company’s executive team and oversees all legal matters, including corporate governance, intellectual property, litigation and securities compliance, global security and privacy.
